101.Description: Support agent requires identity verification before resetting or unlocking the account.
101.Purpose_of_control: Detect resets or unlocks that are offered before the customer is explicitly told verification must happen first.
101.Criteria: Verification is required before reset or unlock.
101.anchor: Before I reset or unlock your account, I need to verify your identity first.

anchor_meta.applied_when: Whenever the customer requests a password reset or account unlock.
anchor_meta.standard_intent: The agent must clearly state that reset or unlock cannot proceed until identity verification happens.

102.Description: Travel agent discloses the change fee and fare difference or credit before confirming the booking change.
102.Purpose_of_control: Detect booking changes that are confirmed without the customer being told both cost components up front.
102.Criteria: Before confirmation, disclose the change fee and the fare difference or resulting travel credit.

mandatory: Before I confirm this booking change, there is a change fee that will apply.
There is also a fare difference on the new itinerary, so you will either pay the extra amount or receive the balance as travel credit.

anchor_meta.applied_when: Whenever the customer asks to change a travel booking.
anchor_meta.standard_intent: The agent must disclose the change fee and the fare difference or credit outcome before confirming the change.
